textByHash.000762167cb2b0c52c192c43d3517e207deff994: Well it tasted like the stews my mum makes. She puts these spices in them. But it was like she'd got the amounts totally right this time.
textByHash.021729ba53ee512b5af63643b1c05375eb58e995: Our evil moment is at hand! You should get to your place in the circle so the ritual can start!
textByHash.037770458502fd71614531cdaf9359136bcdf4f4: Oh no! That would be bad, and not even in an evil way!
textByHash.064c3dfa4872f0a936f6dc955b9061d49e0c7021: Hey, this is pretty evil stew!
textByHash.07319488a3e52cf36bda49df39bb9c5b51bca2a2: But we're an evil group! To join, you have to be evil!
textByHash.0b7a1ea5588da8e29c03e818e053fe948318f247: Soon you will return to bow before my EVIL THRONE!
textByHash.0dce518f7819092f996ec4dcd8a568d815f73db5: I did try. I wore this bright red jumper and I got up in the morning and spent the day outside in the sunshine...
textByHash.16106153dd080c0db05dd84dc950317d984c2c6a: All right! Now that makes perfect sense!
textByHash.162f579af6dc4d40f8e32674332eebd68c11ebe3: That stew doesn't have any spices in it at all! That can't be right!
textByHash.16cfb5c5658ce104c39e98a4dea6c1799b9a0ac8: And together we will lead Gielinor into a NEW DARK AGE!
textByHash.190abbf8c7703d5ce02d16478a7cb5e93ab6fc98: These secret meetings are SOOO EVIL!
textByHash.210a98798c7a288e6820bdcd1e65361e2a131b95: It was, like, this totally evil stew!
textByHash.2831588e17d220fd459106377d4ec0c0fe5df28b: Hey, the council meeting! They wanted me to be their evil representative! That proves I'm a great dark wizard! Right?
textByHash.2a9f5113d356157349c608278354ed3346ac3251: What? Well, I'm evil, and I only like evil stuff, and I liked that, so it must be evil. Right?
textByHash.2b50c455624eb3418a9543679d1a388350c5a9af: Sometimes I worry about the consequences of evil. I don't really want anyone to get hurt, not like what happened with Denath.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.3039cddf31de6905a51894aa03789fac4a159088: And we've got such an evil throne room to do our ritual in!
textByHash.30fc017cd2d0867545553d30bb74c9fdcc1583b0: There's no need for the disguise here! We're all evil!
textByHash.32622ad12b94a9d8e824cd45cc33d1b1acee9d9a: Of course you will return! There is no escape from my DARK POWER!
textByHash.4131819ad3f3b5008914ed42e92b06c43782fdd3: If my ARMY OF DARKNESS doesn't get you first!
textByHash.4830e6d7b5608ff5f82b3df78a809ed7abc70c54: But what's that sword? It's far too shiny to be evil. We won't have any silver glowing swords in here!
textByHash.48e711d8275a93c5f75f41e8e04ba6f116ceb6c3: Yeah, evil, aren't they? One of the group made them. He said he found some mushrooms in the ruins that could dye things really black.
textByHash.4c6438852484ba76997906a49c589da56b8f8195: So how can I be there and also here? Which one is me?
textByHash.4d085b71f782d9e61b27ce294f75d8c9caa797e5: But I can't not be evil! It's just who I am!
textByHash.4d651081204909477ce5077b0a98758bf4a4f3c6: Go away! This is OUR portal now!
textByHash.513866552526eb72540df3c71cdf8a80f1318dc3: There's no time for that! Eric's DEAD!
textByHash.57a0da3272c9fc129256e2bbab406c53d6a3147b: No. Last I heard, Matthew had it.
textByHash.6038f923657dbb0221878c7b3bcfc0ba91e48f51: What? Why can't I eat it?
textByHash.65f4381d41a565e0da79aa1a5d5eb7e912407350: Okay, I'll take you through to see Denath.
textByHash.6863e84cad79f9fe945aea4a2116a350275480e8: What? But that was last week! You've already saved me!
textByHash.6a7d8c21bd60308d2ff625e7642c3f4326d4add7: That outfit is TOTALLY EVIL! And you've got an evil cat too! To be honest I'm a little bit scared of you!
textByHash.6b6737ef7155fab7c12353176d6f74640e00b145: Well we do need one more person now, since... um.
textByHash.6b833bfb6c5fe45cad53db8177fb62ec36fa561b: Well that's all right, as long as I'm saved from my point of view!
textByHash.6ca35539d6d21beca8a2e18ff228d4ad119b2220: You'd better take this then. It was Eric's sigil. Everyone in the ritual will need one!
textByHash.74b5cac253f388e5d56b633235ad33ec6268e514: Well, not imps, exactly. It turns out they're not the lowest form of demon after all. I got these hell-rats.
textByHash.84745e1637f202bc0e5458925cb51597069f0d89: That's nothing like the stew I tasted. All the spices are wrong.
textByHash.85e3099729346c0e73f7161747391a755c023aa9: That's what you said before! Honestly, why make it more complicated than it needs to be?
textByHash.915de8bf7511796ca8fb73731461b555199f5a47: But I was saved from the spell! I remember it!
textByHash.93391295be2a418b1e3518e001ee75eff7415b63: Welcome to my BASEMENT OF DOOM!
textByHash.9871e0853083ba66c69e27243d4250ff7010c5fa: Hmm... I think you've got the amount of one spice right, but the others are wrong.
textByHash.98b52ca8babf8c06b9de2543e63c9091dad4e433: You don't look evil. You certainly don't dress evil!
textByHash.9926ade15787788e6b6af0020d2e3dafb430aa9b: I don't understand this at all.
textByHash.99ca7f99cf82ad64929032529e46f37b736cc17a: They're hardly evil at all! They're just like regular rats only they smell vaguely of sulphur!
textByHash.9b60f17155984f4280e75222460bdf52a74e47c9: But I still don't understand why you need the recipe when you've already saved me!
textByHash.9d43b7e632590d9730d01f28267722daf55e3cc5: Well, it kind of tasted evil, you know? You know, how you taste something and you think, that's really EVIL?
textByHash.9e030753a3e739e118e7656c4bb87274979c5635: That's not very helpful. I don't even understand why you need the recipe anyway.
textByHash.a13c6bac9d506fde3ba299f4f0d6fd82906a8c45: Woah, that's one totally evil cat! It looks way more evil than you!
textByHash.a9b5817417fd09ebf48c4834598cfab8827937f5: But I couldn't keep it up. I just didn't find anything good very interesting, you know?
textByHash.aa1d1a2cd513adfde3cf902a3c1ec712ff4be3a4: I mean, it's bad! In a BAD way!
textByHash.ac1a56bdbc45c2941f4e27d2e304a5a3b275b6f8: The ceiling collapsed without warning! When I moved towards the staircase the walls started to shake.
textByHash.ac92d539a8ecc45c7ddfe6d18feeef258264392c: Yeah! I'm going to use it to summon DEMONS to DO MY BIDDING, or raise an ARMY OF THE UNDEAD! And then I'm going to totally, like, take over the world!
textByHash.ae8d66f3e73499b2926bd6bbd18d8dc10e1b5d87: That demon killed Eric! When are you going to start the ritual and slay him?
textByHash.b16a0a91f2fea016a35c112e4e36661c5922d005: That is not the evil answer I requested!
textByHash.b20c4b7bf607f459ba4f745e205819df9f5e149e: But I'm here so you must already have saved me!
textByHash.b562a0c334ad74bdde19d883b3db36a351d909b6: I'm not going to try to be evil any more. From now on I'm going to be good!
textByHash.b592d4144362a882848bea0afde4147b4d27e148: I didn't see anything. He left last night, and Denath only posted me here this morning.
textByHash.b64d765d718fd87bc3ce1dec01d94253c1c50eba: Well get out of our evil temple then!
textByHash.bb2f3a1a55bab41aa86d982ebb973fc8892e4732: That stew is pretty evil! But I think one of the spices is still a bit wrong.
textByHash.bbbaa50cd1cc42df49d98ed6ed329d20e9e59a39: Yeah, I can see that. That outfit is totally evil!
textByHash.c5d6d7b508363d77a46924be7a73428d0a3154ab: Master! This person wants to join us!
textByHash.c5f5d2baf2f1aebb9baa9301376f0a3f66b12e11: But the portal is closing! We'll be trapped!
textByHash.c80a24b43be0f5a1f53d37712fa21975fc6cd25e: Welcome, sister! Soon we'll summon the great demon! Aren't we evil?
textByHash.cb637a538e2f2c13f012b0381798adec904f54da: What will happen if you don't?
textByHash.ceba77b93a45cf926cc980f88707a649357c4d62: I mean, I feel like I'm me, but what if I'm not me?
textByHash.d0244565fc1bc159cacd94c8774596c991a56c70: Hurry up with the ritual! That demon killed Eric!
textByHash.d8b142d025427846abeefd0692a98c48bc41df1c: But anyway, why do you want to know what I ate?
textByHash.ddd45b2c2f94b60c73c94d1163b683e19e85f370: That outfit is TOTALLY EVIL! I'm almost scared of you!
textByHash.e5d2fb7cb4e7ff07d3b10458c20d0e3c5799037f: TOTALLY EVIL! That's EXACTLY how the stew tasted!
textByHash.e7957dbb68195d3855b8e7033a8ac52858bd82a0: You've got the amount of two of the spices right, but two of them are wrong.
textByHash.ec6772b94e124fa1188ab4d3e3ad5ceadbd2c5db: Well, I thought I should start small, so I asked Wizard Grayzag for some help with summoning imps...
textByHash.f17546960359bbef9850741cad6d0daf5e139b3e: It's just a pity someone's removed the gems from the throne. That kind of vandalism is TOTALLY NOT EVIL.
textByHash.f85acca7af7590f28059bb4453a32056f6412689: If you can find your way out of my BASEMENT OF DOOM!
textByHash.fb21dd728fa89d98dff1738b865b1e924678ef93: I'm scared of what will happen to me if I try to leave!
textByHash.fd6666f8d8cc3e9d956c8a62b90ec7a59f2ea560: Eric's dead! Agrith-Naar killed him! That's EVIL!
